message:
refactor(create): extract RelationContext struct for populate_relations, fix clippy lints

- Replace 8-parameter populate_relations() with a single RelationContext<'a>
  struct that bundles actor, timestamp, resolved_parent, storage, all_ids,
  and prefix — improving readability and reducing call-site noise in
  create_issue_impl()
- Fix integer literal type annotation: use 365_u64 * 1000 and explicit
  unwrap_or(365_000) to avoid ambiguous as-cast in expunge check
- Replace .clone() with .clone_from() in export dedup to avoid an
  unnecessary allocation (clippy::assigning_clones)
- Replace format!("just now") with "just now".to_string() to avoid
  useless format macro invocation (clippy::useless_format)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
